name: Coates, Earl
motto: "A life-long evening with batting practice I tried to hit the pill, but my slamming was nigh a vision of one."
description: Earl was noted for his aptness and should be a success at whatever he should try.

name: Phillips, L. W.
motto: "A sail, Aho! the burning decks and water barren— I do athirst—not a dream, maybe."
description: This was his first year at Aggie and we would commend him for anything he should undertake.

name: Russell, Sam H.
motto: "A path of rugged hue I climb, and subdue."
description: This is his first year and he has set an example that will lead anyone to success. He has stood on the topmost round of the ladder of average throughout the year.

name: Webb, Burl
motto: "Undisputed blond-topped king of Aggiedom."
description: Curley's stay with Aggie was both pleasant and profitable, and many friends will miss his "blond top".

name: Clark, Hilda
motto: "I wonder if it is a Rose?"
description: Though she is the smallest in the class, that is not to say that she has not accomplished as much. Hilda has left many friends at Aggie.

name: Hill, Fred
motto: "Always interested in everything and smiles at everyone."
description: A first year Aggie man, but he's proved to be of sterling value to the school. Many will be the number that claims "Rip" as a friend.

name: Griffin, Clarence
motto: "A steady drop wears away the mighty stone."
description: He's a hustler—not a rustler, and we will miss his Ford at Aggie next year.

name: McIlroy, Myrtle
motto: "Life is sighing, sweetly flowing a friend to gently be."
description: O. H.'s sister. This is her first year and she has made good in all of her work.

name: Coates, Arch
motto: "A city of steeples rare and lights of incessant glare."
description: If you are looking for a worthwhile man—don't pass him by.

name: Hamm, Elmer
motto: "A fading light in the East has been dispersed."
description: Elmer has no peers and has not any servants—for he serves.

name: McGuire, Newell
motto: "Unbroken shall thy clouds of smiles assail."
description: Newell is a friend of all the Senior Class, and a wreath of joy.

name: Critz, Gillespie
motto: "And to Pluto break the news I'm there—but look out."
description: "Dago" was Old Aggie's keeper and dog-buyer of our class. He was a Galinapier favorite and Put's sister's, too. Doing was his by-word and accomplishment his farewell.

name: Whaley, Norman
motto: "Let's go, call the signals, boys!"
description: Norman is a force of action, and if you should pick for a winner and doer, choose him, for he represented Aggie in its Annual Debate in '22.

name: Shoptaw, Ruth
motto: "To have friends is to be one."
description: Ruth is musically talented, she has a smile for everyone and always is polite.

name: Clark, Otho
motto: "Life is short, so am I."
description: Otho is the smallest boy in the Senior Class, but this fact does not mean he is not at the top, a worker with a smile.

name: Smith, Holvey
motto: "Think twice before you speak and then don't say it."
description: This is Holvey's first year, and from the impression that he made, he should make a mark in the world. He's able, he's proficient, he's willing, and he always tackles a job with a smile.

name: West, Imogene
motto: "Curly's pal, and—'Yes, he's curly-headed, but I like him.'"
description: Imogene is worthy of any school, and there has not been any one else eclipsed her.

name: Ramey, Edward
motto: "If he ever falls in love, great will be the fall thereof."
description: He's willing to do it with a smile.

name: Fortner, Raymond
motto: "Beauty and wisdom don't go together—I'll take beauty."
description: Raymond is Ada Mae's brother, and a smile will introduce him to you.

name: Booe, Katherine
motto: "I always like and like—but my like is small."
description: She is an all-around athlete and has many fine musical talents. By her personality she leaves Aggie a debtor to her.

name: Ham, G. W.
motto: "Wisdom and beauty all commingled."
clubs: Assistant Business Manager and Editor of the Agricola '23
description: G. W. has always been a star student and an all-around man. He is one of the ablest students that Aggie has produced.

name: Robertson, Ralph
motto: "Ralph never studies, never worries and makes good everywhere."
description: Ralph is a success for he drives a FORD. He is a physics genius.

name: Thompson, Beulah
motto: "Sweet and low, sweet and low, blow, blow me a sweater again."
description: She is one of the most enthusiastic of all Aggies. A pep meeting is not complete without her yells. Quiet, confident and smiling—no better compliment can be paid her. Beulah is a true blue Aggie, and is for everything that's Aggie's

name: McIlroy, O. H.
motto: "Married, Girls—I'm sorry."
clubs: Member of the '21 and '22 Football team
description: Mac has been a busy man this year, and his unselfishness and squareness will win for him anywhere.

name: Ewing, Ward
motto: "I love to buy 'hosses' for $70.00 and watch them go through a Ford—How com'?"
clubs: Member of the Stock Judging Team '21-'22
description: Ewing is an ex-servicer in many things, and leaves Aggie an A-1 Aggie. If you are looking for a man to do the impossible—try him. Ewing was a man of visionary ideals and worked to make them a concrete thing.

name: Kumpe, Edna
motto: "To know her is to like her."
description: Edna has many good qualities, but the best is—being a friend with smiles.

name: Neal, John
motto: "Of all the girls I ever found, there's none as fine as Vivian."
description: John is energetic and industrious, being the youngest member (in age) of the Senior Class. A job is never too big for him to tackle.

name: Nance, Lawrence
motto: "He's the pal of Miss Pruitt."
description: Lawrence will make good anywhere. He is a good athlete, and a good conversationalist—He should make a good lawyer.

name: Shoptaw, Lila
motto: "She has a winning smile—but who? Oh! Rosco."
description: Full-of-pec would be a fitting word. Lila has been a booster for Aggie and the Senior Class, although she, living in town, was not enrolled in all the societies. A bet for anybody.

name: Roady, Rosco
motto: "When a strong brain is weighed with a true heart, it is like balancing a bubble against a wedge of gold."
description: Rosco has been one of the biggest boosters of our class, and we regret that this will be his last year.

name: Vaughn, Edgar
motto: "A fishing trip with Emory over yonder caused me to have a broken cylinder."
description: Without Edgar our class would have been incomplete.

name: Braselton, Thelma
motto: "Oh! Why can it not be that I cannot make my wish of thee?"
description: Thelma is an inspiration to any class. She is one of the best students in school. Though red-headed, she retains her humor.

name: Tyler, Harold
motto: "I oft in my vision of youth, when life clouds are sailing, I vision a walk's the truth from Aggie to Mrs. Howard's unavailing."
description: His contemporaries cannot say that he is lazy for he walks, after he visits Little Rock. A prompt and attentive student was he.

name: Arch, Bewley
description: Archie has attained much in both sports and studies. He's a lover of singing—I guess.

name: Bonnie, Reasoner
description: Bonnie graduated from this school with the class of '21. But she heard the call for College Students and honored us with her presence.

name: John, Walker
description: John came to us from Scranton, Ark. He graduated with the class of '21.

name: Hazel, Winn
description: Hazel is a R. H. S. graduate and is very popular with the Aggie students. A lightning-bug attache.

name: Enoch, Young
description: Enoch first won his name in the Hall of Fame playing ball with the second football squadron.

name: Rogers, Faye
description: Faye is little but loud in making friends and spreading sunshine. She was not content with one "power", but wanted "Powers".

name: Myover, James A.
description: "Jimmie" is one of the old "gang".

name: King, Irene
description: An organization is not complete without Irene.

name: Stanley, Frank
description: "Slats" was popular with everyone - especially the fairer sex.

name: White, Jim
description: Jimmie's first year with us and it has been pleasant. Jim's our mile-run demon.

name: Lathrop, James
description: Public Speaking is his knack—maybe?—As flirty as the ships of Arctic Ocean.

name: Nixon, Monta
description: A smile a face is his slogan. Monta has a smile on his face always. He was very popular with the fair sex—especially in town.

name: Jones, Noel
description: Noel finished here in '21 and attended the University one year. But, being a loyal "Aggie," he returned when our College Course was added.

name: Stokes, George W.
description: George is one you can depend on even if he has to ride a "Bike". Ask the lady that wears his sweater?

name: Shoptaw, Lavan
description: Van has been one of our best students this year and has, in our opinion, crowned even his own brilliant record as a student.

name: Allbright, Fred
description: Fred is one of our best track men. He makes good at most everything.

name: Cone, Henry S.
motto: "Let me see beyond the vale"—and he does.
description: Henry has made a commendable record at Aggie.

name: Farris, Emory
description: Emory was our wireless wizard and expert. He was apt and willing to do his share. Especially fond of driving a certain Ford. (?)

name: Hamilton, Henry
description: Henry is an ardent believer in outdoor exercises. We are proud to have him in our ranks.

name: Powers, Denton
motto: "Best things are put up in small packages."
description: Denton is a fair sample.

name: Moore, Fay
description: Fay is a good student, quite the alert, and has made Aggie a better school by her presence.

name: Jones, Carroll
description: "Cap" has been with us so long we don't distinctly remember when he did join our ranks. He finished in '21 but was with us part of last year and all of this year.

name: Hines, Thelma
description: A Domestic Science fiend is a lover of eats. Thelma is a friend of all; a graduate of Russellville High, and an Aggie booster.

name: Reasoner, Clark
description: He graduated with the class of '21. "Fatty" is an athlete, an orator and a humorist by birth.

name: Arrington, Snowden
description: Snowden is an all-round student and athlete.

name: Sibley, Margaret
description: Her dark beauty has caused the heart of many a gallant Aggie stripling to flutter.

name: Newman, Autrey
description: "Sir Autrey's" hobby is Chemistry and Debating.

name: McIlroy, Maude
description: Maude excels in Home Economics. Everything she does is reliable, faithful and trustworthy.

name: Arrington, Jim Hugh
description: Jim Hugh was a good student and an A-1 ladies' man. Also a good friend of Esther's.

name: Overton, Sadder
motto: "If Rome is burning, let it burn, if it means that I have to hurry."

name: Dennis, Rose
description: Dennis finished this school with the class of '20. But when the College Course was added this year he again caught the "Aggie Spirit."

name: Ernest, Cheatham
motto: "When I rise to speak, let all ears be inclined to listen."

name: Harold, Crum
description: A "trig" fiend. Harold was one of the foremost college students.

name: Ishmael, Jones
description: "Galla" was some duck hunter and was one of the State's best basketball players.

name: Ellis, E. Lauhon
clubs: Vice President Lee Debating Society (1st term) '21
description: For lo, these many years "RIP" has been a faithful "Aggie".

name: Veda, Vaughn
description: Veda is ever ready and willing to do her part in all school activities. She is a "jolly good student."

name: Roy, A. Nolan
description: Roy withdrew from "Aggie" in 1917 and joined the U.S.N. He returned in 1919 showing signs of having fought the battle of "Champagne".

name: Louis, Hood
description: When Paul Thompson left "Boog" became High Chief Yodeler and Mimicker of Aggie.

name: Sands, Bunyan
description: Bunyan is one of the most consistent workers in the Junior Class. He has made good in everything that he has attempted.

name: Gill, Estelle
description: She is always willing to share responsibilities and duties.

name: Cheatham, G. E.
description: G. E. hails from Tennessee, but stays about Clinton so much that he's from there. Due to his enthusiasm and pep he has endeared himself to Aggie and a bright future cannot fail to lie in his pathway.

name: Danley, Bonnie
description: Bonnie has made a splendid student. She has been with the class for some few years and will always remain endeared to Aggieville.

name: Long, Euel
description: Euel partakes in most all of the musical performances. He has been with Aggie for two years and the Senior Class of '24 will have a splendid representative in him.

name: Overby, Varnell
description: Varnell is one of the most popular girls in her Class, although this is her first year.

name: White, Sam
description: "Stony" was always found on the scene of action. Throughout the football season he was always found at practice time on the gridiron. Though too small to make the team, he helped to make it.

name: Hill, Richard
description: The Senior Class next year will be fortunate to have him as a member.

name: Hall, Lee
description: Lee is a genius in English and Anson's friend. He has made a lasting impression on Aggieville.

name: Johnson, Iris
description: This is Iris' second year. She has many splendid qualities which will lead her to a bright future.

name: Burton, Howard
description: Howard is one of the best students that Aggie ever had, and has shown himself to be a leader among men.

name: Eikleberry, Murrel
description: Though red-headed, he has surmounted the ladder round by round and is always on the job.

name: Stanley, Richmond
description: Though not one of the oldest members in school—a record he has made.

name: McNeal, Velma
description: Velma has been one of Aggie's best students. We are sure she will make good regardless of where her life may take her.

name: Graham, Love
description: Love has fought hard on the gridiron, and he also made an excellent student.

name: Howie, Margaret (Guest)
description: She had a marked degree of success at whatever she attempted—but, I'm afraid she has a job now.

name: Powers, Cecil
description: Cecil's ambition was to be a friend to everyone.

name: Stanford, Cecil
description: One of the peppiest girls that ever played on the girls' basketball court. Small, but peppy.

name: Hayes, McClanahan
description: By his consistency in the classroom has made Hayes one of the most popular students at Aggie.

name: Lucile, Hogins
description: She is one of the highest standing pupils in school in class work and deportment.

name: Bunyan, Webb
description: An orator of ability.

name: Pat, Hamm
clubs: member of the Little Wonder Football Team
member of nearly every other organization at Aggie
description: Pat has shown a wonderful spirit and has numerous talents which he is wisely using.

name: Helen, Pruett
description: Helen is a new member of the class, but by her musical talents and graceful smiles has endeared herself with Aggie and Aggies.

name: Joe, Bishop
clubs: member of the Prician Literary Society
description: Joe, the boy of refinement and kindness, is one of Aggie's jewels of rare qualities. The Senior Class would profit much next year to have him as a member.

name: Callins, Eugene
description: A first-class student and an A-1 athlete, is this Franklin County boy.

name: Dollar, Okla
description: Okla has an admirable disposition and always has a host of friends.

name: Spicer, Harold
description: Harold has been with us for some time and by his deportment has made a place in the hearts of "Old Aggie".

name: Ganner, Harold
description: Harold is one of the strongest boosters that has ever graced the halls of "Aggie" and a two-year football letter man.

name: Williams, Trumann
description: Another representative of Franklin County. He has made a good record and was a strong contestant in the Declamation Contest.

name: McKenzie, Inera
description: She was a member of the Girls' Basketball Team, and with her wonderful ability she can accomplish any task that shall come her way.

name: Capps, Clarence
description: This is the first year for Clarence, but he proved by his presence the first day he entered that he had the Aggie spirit—the spirit that will win in most cases.

name: Dickens, Marion
description: Marion has proved to be an Agriculturist of the first rank and we hope that he will be a Senior next year.

name: Gray, Rogers
description: Rogers' face is an Aggie asset, because he has proved by his consistent work, that he will be a success.

name: Patterson, Howard
description: Howard was fortunate in living so close to Aggie, and we were fortunate in his doing so.

name: Aikman, Anson
description: For the past three years Anson has made a splendid student for Aggie, and always has a smile left.

name: Wells, Sellers
description: He is noted for his musical abilities, and is in constant demand at the various churches in town. Success will be the end of his efforts.

name: Russell, Garland
description: Garland has shown a great interest in the livestock work, and with his PUSH he will win.

name: Perkins, Reid
description: Reid has made one of Aggie's best students. Success will be his reward.

name: Reed, Mayo
description: This is his first year at Aggie and since we know that he has the true Aggie spirit we are sure he will make a good representative for his class.

name: Buzbee, Hugh
description: Hugh has been with Aggie since 1919 and has made good each year. He always looks on the bright side of life, and we are pulling for him to be with us again next year.
